creator: eduard.epi@t-online.de
text:
I am getting the same thing on a Asus K7V-board with an Athlon 700.
The text seems to be the same, but I don't know for sure, as the
text is scrolling very quickly. I have a Symbios 53C810a-controller
to which is attached my CDROM. This is very bad, for I cannot install
FreeBSD! Is there any help known?
Under Linux I had the same problem with the sym53c8xx driver and I had
to replace it by the older ncr-driver.

Peter B
